event: blackbox_exporter deploy — Bucket 1 prove-the-wheel (sushi-k) then VM real-vantage; the single remaining blackbox gate (live :9115 exporter) cleared on two hosts
authorization: Operator endorsed ChatGPT's order (blackbox = step 4) and chose 'first 1, then 2' — sushi-k prove-the-wheel first, then the VM. Commit+push cleared (holiday). The VM new-service install was explicitly named in the chosen option ('a new persistent service on the public box').
gate_closed: Per 2026-07-03T0712Z receipt the blackbox Bucket 1 gate had reduced to ONE blocker: no live blackbox_exporter process (:9115 absent). Now stood up on sushi-k + VM; provenance (mig 058) + live nq-serve were already cleared.
blackbox_exporter: upstream v0.28.0 linux-amd64 (static Go binary — same binary works across glibc 2.39/2.35). Bound 127.0.0.1:9115 (not exposed). sushi-k: user-systemd nq-blackbox.service, binary ~/nq/blackbox/. VM: system-systemd /etc/systemd/system/nq-blackbox.service, binary /opt/notquery/blackbox/. Config = nq-blackbox repo blackbox.yml (http_2xx + dns_a modules).

promotions.sushi-k: nq_aggregator_http_localhost (http_2xx, Bucket 1 overlap) -> http://127.0.0.1:9848/. SMOKE PASS: probe_success=1 ingested as scrape_target_name='nq_aggregator_http_localhost', scrape_target_collision=0, content intact. All 5 PROBE_CATALOG promotion criteria met against a LIVE exporter.
promotions.linode-vm: external_http_nq_neutralzone (http_2xx, Bucket 3 new-vantage) -> https://nq.neutral.zone/. SMOKE PASS: probe_success=1 as scrape_target_name='external_http_nq_neutralzone', collision=0. Exercises full public-path stack (DNS -> Caddy -> TLS 1.3 -> public bind); valid Let's Encrypt cert CN=nq.neutral.zone observed via probe_ssl_earliest_cert_expiry. VANTAGE HONESTY: exporter is ON the VM = same host as the endpoint, NOT a foreign-network vantage; does not testify external users can reach it.

collision_finding: Confirmed live: blackbox /probe emits BARE probe_success (no instance/job label); NQ series identity is (metric_name, labels_json), so two probe_success-emitting targets on ONE host collapse to one series flagged scrape_target_collision=1 (ambiguous, not laundered). Therefore ONE clean bare-probe_success target per island (series tables are per-host). dns_neutralzone_localhost + labelwatch_health_localhost stay commented candidates. Multi-probe-per-host unlock = the deferred identity migration (NQ_SCRAPE_TARGET_IDENTITY_SCOPE). The http prober's multi-phase probe_http_duration_seconds rows DO carry a distinguishing phase label and stay collision-free — verified.
verification: scripts/smoke_probe.sh (5-step contract, distinct exit code per incident class) EXIT=0 on both hosts. Bare exit codes, not eyeballed. Provenance rows queried directly (collision=0 confirmed).

next: The natural next lever for blackbox is the scrape-target IDENTITY migration (NQ_SCRAPE_TARGET_IDENTITY_SCOPE) — unblocks multi-probe-per-host (dns_a, labelwatch health, tls_expiry as its own promoted probe, Bucket 2 contradiction probes). Deferred/scoped in-repo; a code slice, not a deploy. A true off-network vantage (foreign host) is separate future infra.
